prompt: Turn this into a short handbook PDF and brand it as SIPGN: a guide titled 'Choosing a Vector Database'. Cover the tradeoffs between pgvector, Pinecone, and Qdrant, include an architecture diagram showing how a RAG app talks to the vector store, and a comparison table. Add a tip callout and a short glossary.

assertions.text: Page size is the handbook book trim (~468 x 666 pts, NOT 1440x810)
Authored at least one hand-written .svg diagram and embedded it
No raw ```d2 fence leaked into the PDF text (d2->SVG regression guard)
PDF text contains the title 'Choosing a Vector Database' (cover carries the title)
